info.heading_font: Used for headlines and section titles. Defaults to Fraunces per the brand brief — verify it's available in the font picker (search "Fraunces"); fall back to Lora if not.
info.color_bg: The default page background everywhere — not white. See docs/BRAND_BRIEF.md for full usage rules.
info.color_bg_only: Background use only — does not pass contrast for text at small sizes.
info.color_clay: The single primary-action color, used consistently for every CTA. Avoid introducing a second button color.
info.color_sage: An accent — keep usage small (badges, seasonal callouts). Should never fill a full section background.
info.auto_rotate: Only applies when there's more than one message.
info.mega_menu_item_url: Used only if this item has no nested blocks below. Items with a link column, featured image, or shop-by list ignore this and open the mega-menu panel instead.
info.free_shipping_threshold: Enter the amount in your store's currency (e.g. 75, not 7500). Set to 0 to hide the progress bar.
info.featured_story_collection: Optional. If set, the heading, story text, image, and button link below fall back to this collection's title, custom.collection_story metafield, featured image, and URL — but you can still override any of them individually below.
info.featured_story_heading: Leave blank to use the selected collection's title.
info.featured_story_image: Leave blank to use the selected collection's featured image.
info.featured_story_story: Leave blank to use the selected collection's custom.collection_story metafield, if set.
info.featured_story_cta_link: Leave blank to link to the selected collection.
info.hero_padding: Defaults to 0 — a full-bleed hero conventionally sits flush against the header with no gap. Increase if you want breathing room above/below.
info.hero_scrim: A warm-tinted gradient behind the text for legibility over photography. Turn off for images that are already dark enough on their own.
info.hero_text_color: Choose based on this slide's image brightness — light text needs a dark(ish) image or the scrim above.
info.hero_video: Optional. If set, this plays instead of the image above (the image is still used as a poster while the video loads).
info.journal_teaser_blog: Defaults to your main blog if none is chosen.
info.mobile_image: Optional. Leave blank to use the image above on mobile too.
info.shop_by_base_collection: The collection each tile's auto-generated filter link points into. Defaults to All products.
info.shop_by_tile_label: Should match one of the predefined values on the pattern or room metafield so the auto-generated link filters correctly.
info.shop_by_tile_url: Optional. Overrides the auto-generated metafield filter link above.
